news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries' Mansion House Brandy sales reached 10 million cases.
This marks a rise from FY25’s sales of 8.7 million cases.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries' Mansion House Brandy sales reached 10 million cases.
This marks a rise from FY25’s sales of 8.7 million cases.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries' Mansion House Brandy sales rose to 10M cases in FY26 from 8.7M in FY25.
Company plans national expansion, launched Monarch Legacy Edition, a luxury pure grape brandy.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries' Mansion House Brandy sales rose to 10M cases in FY26 from 8.7M in FY25.
Company plans national expansion, launched Monarch Legacy Edition, a luxury pure grape brandy.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries gets Rs 169 crore tax relief for AY 2016-25.
No material financial impact; company to review the order and decide next steps.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries gets Rs 169 crore tax relief for AY 2016-25.
No material financial impact; company to review the order and decide next steps.

news.title:
Citibank disclosed under SEBI regulations that TIMF HOLDINGS holds 6.84% in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
Total holdings amount to 16,906,315 shares out of a paid-up equity capital of 247,170,825 shares.
news.summary:
Citibank disclosed under SEBI regulations that TIMF HOLDINGS holds 6.84% in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
Total holdings amount to 16,906,315 shares out of a paid-up equity capital of 247,170,825 shares.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries reports a 95% revenue surge after acquiring Imperial Blue.
The acquisition boosts Tilaknagar Industries' market share to 32%.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries reports a 95% revenue surge after acquiring Imperial Blue.
The acquisition boosts Tilaknagar Industries' market share to 32%.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries' Q3 volume grew 76.1% YoY to 53.1 lakh cases. Net revenue rose 95% YoY to Rs. 664 Cr.
EBITDA increased 82.3% to Rs. 110 Cr, while PAT rose 40.1% YoY to Rs. 76 Cr in Q3.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries' Q3 volume grew 76.1% YoY to 53.1 lakh cases. Net revenue rose 95% YoY to Rs. 664 Cr.
EBITDA increased 82.3% to Rs. 110 Cr, while PAT rose 40.1% YoY to Rs. 76 Cr in Q3.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries Ltd to host Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 13, 2026, at 5 PM IST.
Discussion led by senior management; details available on www.tilind.com.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries Ltd to host Q3 FY26 earnings call on Feb 13, 2026, at 5 PM IST.
Discussion led by senior management; details available on www.tilind.com.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries appoints Rajesh Choudhary as CFO, citing 29+ years of experience.
Choudhary has 22+ years in the alcobev sector, notably with Pernod Ricard India.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries appoints Rajesh Choudhary as CFO, citing 29+ years of experience.
Choudhary has 22+ years in the alcobev sector, notably with Pernod Ricard India.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries Ltd announced changes in Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) and Senior Management Personnel (SMP). Rajesh Choudhary is now CFO, replacing Abhinav Gupta.
Minuzeer Bamboat takes on additional role as Head-Legal. Nishant Jain, Ameya Deshpande, and Tarun Behl receive new designations in senior management.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries Ltd announced changes in Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) and Senior Management Personnel (SMP). Rajesh Choudhary is now CFO, replacing Abhinav Gupta.
Minuzeer Bamboat takes on additional role as Head-Legal. Nishant Jain, Ameya Deshpande, and Tarun Behl receive new designations in senior management.

news.title:
Imperial Blue whisky sales hit 1.79M cases under new ownership in Dec 25.
Tilaknagar Industries leads Prestige segment in South India with 32-39% share.
news.summary:
Imperial Blue whisky sales hit 1.79M cases under new ownership in Dec 25.
Tilaknagar Industries leads Prestige segment in South India with 32-39% share.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Tilaknagar Industries' long-term rating at 'Crisil A - Stable' post Imperial Blue acquisition.
The acquisition triples TIL's scale, diversifies its portfolio, but increases debt, moderating profitability and debt metrics.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Tilaknagar Industries' long-term rating at 'Crisil A - Stable' post Imperial Blue acquisition.
The acquisition triples TIL's scale, diversifies its portfolio, but increases debt, moderating profitability and debt metrics.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries' promoters encumbered 81.6% of their holdings via NDUs and pledges for financing.
Funds raised will aid acquisition of Imperial Blue Brands; Catalyst Trusteeship Limited acts as security trustee.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries' promoters encumbered 81.6% of their holdings via NDUs and pledges for financing.
Funds raised will aid acquisition of Imperial Blue Brands; Catalyst Trusteeship Limited acts as security trustee.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries completed acquiring Pernod Ricard's Imperial Blue business for Rs 3,442.3 cr.
The acquisition enhances Tilaknagar's whisky portfolio, creating a PAN India IMFL business with Imperial Blue as its premium base.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries completed acquiring Pernod Ricard's Imperial Blue business for Rs 3,442.3 cr.
The acquisition enhances Tilaknagar's whisky portfolio, creating a PAN India IMFL business with Imperial Blue as its premium base.

news.title:
Catalyst Trusteeship disclosed encumbrance on 26% shares of Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
Promoter Amit Dahanukar agreed to retain control, prevent share transfers without lender consent.
news.summary:
Catalyst Trusteeship disclosed encumbrance on 26% shares of Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
Promoter Amit Dahanukar agreed to retain control, prevent share transfers without lender consent.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries issues 34 lakh equity shares to Singularity Equity Fund warrant holders.
Singularity Equity Fund is led by Madhusudan Kela.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries issues 34 lakh equity shares to Singularity Equity Fund warrant holders.
Singularity Equity Fund is led by Madhusudan Kela.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries plans revised guidance post-Imperial Blue deal closure.
Management updates expected through concall after deal completion.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries plans revised guidance post-Imperial Blue deal closure.
Management updates expected through concall after deal completion.

news.title:
Tilaknagar Industries expects FY26 EBITDA margins similar to H1 or slightly higher.
FY27-28 EBITDA margins projected at around 60% on a standalone basis.
news.summary:
Tilaknagar Industries expects FY26 EBITDA margins similar to H1 or slightly higher.
FY27-28 EBITDA margins projected at around 60% on a standalone basis.
